chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 697 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 2913/2023 2.For hearing of main case 10-08-2023 None present for the petitioner. ***** None present for the petitioner; no intimation is received; same as the position on the last date of hearing. Accordingly, instant petition stands dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
